name: bldg_ids_applied_in_1
description: Building keys that applied to upgrade 1, CO. Used for the applied_in intersection invariant.

name: bldg_ids_applied_in_2
description: Building keys that applied to upgrade 2, CO. Used for the applied_in intersection invariant.

name: bldg_ids_applied_in_1_and_2
description: Building keys that applied to BOTH upgrade 1 and upgrade 2, CO. Equals the intersection of applied_in_1 and applied_in_2.
